marketplace.name: Sports-Plugins
marketplace.description: A curated marketplace of high-quality community sports plugins for Claude Code, Codex, and AI coding assistants

plugins.name: cbb-sabermetrics
plugins.description: Live college baseball sabermetrics for 330 NCAA DI programs — wOBA, wRC+, FIP, BABIP, ISO, conference power index, SOS-adjusted rankings. Wraps the Blaze Sports Intel MCP at blazesportsintel.com/mcp. Free tier, 30 requests/min, no API key.

plugins.name: texas-longhorns-intel
plugins.description: Texas Longhorns baseball intelligence — scouting reports, SEC matchup previews, roster evaluation, NIL efficiency analysis, program history. Depends on cbb-sabermetrics.

plugins.name: live-scores
plugins.description: Real-time sports scores, schedules, and game updates across MLB, NFL, NBA, and college sports

plugins.name: college-baseball-sabermetrics
plugins.description: Advanced college baseball sabermetrics — wOBA, FIP, wRC+, barrel rates, and pitch-level analytics

plugins.name: fantasy-sports
plugins.description: Fantasy sports roster optimization, matchup analysis, trade evaluator, and waiver wire recommendations

plugins.name: sports-data-explorer
plugins.description: Query and explore sports statistics, compare players, and generate data visualizations

plugins.name: college-football-intel
plugins.description: College football intelligence — transfer portal tracking, recruiting rankings, conference standings, and Big 12 analytics

plugins.name: mlb-the-show
plugins.description: MLB The Show Diamond Dynasty card analytics — card valuations, market trends, squad builder, and investment picks

external_plugins.name: blaze-sports-intel
external_plugins.description: Blaze Sports Intel (BSI) integration — college baseball box scores, Texas Longhorns intel, and advanced analytics via blazesportsintel.com MCP
